data.title: 国际服违规账号封禁21
data.summary: [7/11 (Tue) Ban Notice] We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-g
data.body:
[7/11 (Tue) Ban Notice]
We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-game system in Total Assault and the transaction system.

▶ Total number of players banned: 7
▶ Period: Permanent
More details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3220&thread=2202324

#BlueArchive
